title: Research: Deploy coder subagent for Día to delegate to
notes: Research complete. Two patterns available: (1) Native subagent via sessions_spawn — best for isolated one-shot coding tasks, runs in own session, announces result back. (2) ACP harness via sessions_spawn with runtime:acp — spawns Codex/Claude Code/Gemini CLI as persistent bound session, thread-bindable on Discord. Recommendation: use ACP + Codex with thread:true mode:session for persistent coder. Config: acp.enabled=true, acp.defaultAgent=codex, plugins.entries.acpx.config.permissionMode=approve-all. Día can delegate build tasks with sessions_spawn({runtime:acp,agentId:codex,thread:true,mode:session,task:...}).
